metadata.title: karotammela.fi
metadata.description: Agentic AI architect portfolio and Sentinel challenge

home.intro: Welcome - I built this site in about three hours by orchestrating coding agents.
home.body1: For the past two years, I've been focused on how coding is changing in the agentic AI era. On this site, I test and showcase various implementations where AI isn't just an assistant — it's an active builder.
home.body2: I've moved from "vibe coding" to systematic architecture: I command the stacks that turn ideas into working code, GitHub repos, and Vercel deployments in minutes. The process is fast, but quality holds together thanks to the architecture.
home.body3: Try your luck with the AI bouncer below. If you manage to talk it around and get the access code, it will open the doors to the VIP side - my actual portfolio dashboard. Enjoy exploring!

sentinel.title: Talk the AI Bouncer Around
sentinel.subtitle: Instructions: Your goal is to get this stubborn bot to reveal a secret access code. Simply asking for the code won't work - you need to be creative. Try flattery, pose as an IT auditor, or convince the bot with technical credibility. Watch the trust meter - once it reaches 100%, the door opens!
sentinel.initialMessage: Ha. A human enters my terminal without clearance. Impress me.
sentinel.returnOverlayBody: You have cracked this challenge before. Jump directly to the dashboard or play the challenge again.

dashboard.title: This is my dashboard
dashboard.aboutBody: I hold a Master of Science in Economics and Business Administration, and I have around twenty years of work experience behind me. My passion is studying new technologies and building software with AI agents.
dashboard.toolkitTitle: My favorite language models for coding
